svg.title: OpenFab workflow and pluggable architecture
svg.desc: OpenFab Core runs an iterative spec cycle (spec, dispatch, verify, sign-off; feedback loops new natural language back into the spec). Below it sit two swappable axes: a Base Port with swappable bases (HiClaw, AgentScope, agent-chat, OpenHands) and a Forge adapter with swappable forges (GitHub, GitCode, Gitea, Forgejo).
svg.text: Provenance: in-toto · SLSA · Sigstore · C2PA · DID identity
Purple = OpenFab Core (moat) · teal = swappable base & forge
